home.title: Fortunato Geelhoed

home.body:
Full-stack developer specialising in modern web applications.

about.title: About
about.description: Senior TypeScript engineer based in Spain, building for the web since 2015.
about.body:
I'm Fortunato Geelhoed, a senior full-stack engineer based in Spain, working through JiggyBit S.L.

I specialise in TypeScript, React, Vue, and Angular with deep experience in performance optimisation, design systems, and server-side rendering.

services.title: Services
services.description: Frontend architecture, design systems, performance consulting, and full-stack development.
services.body:
I offer consulting and development services across the modern web stack:

- Frontend architecture and design systems
- Performance auditing and optimisation
- Full-stack TypeScript development
- Framework migration and modernisation

work.title: Case Studies
work.description: Selected projects demonstrating expertise in modern web development.
work.body: A curated collection of projects showcasing frontend architecture, performance engineering, and full-stack development.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Writing about TypeScript, frontend architecture, and web performance.
blog.body: Thoughts on frontend engineering, TypeScript patterns, and building for the modern web.

contact.title: Let's work together
contact.description: Get in touch for consulting, freelance projects, or collaboration.
contact.body: I'm currently available for new projects. Reach out to discuss how I can help.
